description: >-
  The Cache library provides functions for manipulating the instance reference
  cache.
icon: trash-can
---

# Cache



## Overview

These functions allow you to:

* Replace cached instance references
* Invalidate cached references
* Check if an instance is cached

## Available Functions

| Function                            | Description                         |
| ----------------------------------- | ----------------------------------- |
| [`cache.replace`](replace.md)       | Replace a cached instance reference |
| [`cache.invalidate`](invalidate.md) | Remove an instance from the cache   |
| [`cache.iscached`](iscached.md)     | Check if an instance is cached      |

## Related Functions

| Function                                                                   | Description                     |
| -------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------- |
| [`cloneref`](https://docs.volt.bz/docs/instances/cloneref)                 | Clone an instance reference     |
| [`compareinstances`](https://docs.volt.bz/docs/instances/compareinstances) | Compare two instance references |
